evidence.quote_or_path: A single-chain construct of Fab16 (scFv16)41, tagged with an 8× histidine sequence at the C-terminus, was cloned into a modified pVL1392 baculovirus transfer vector for secreted expression; Development of an antibody fragment that stabilizes GPCR/G-protein complexes.
evidence.reasoning: The paper explicitly identifies scFv16 as a single-chain construct derived from an antibody fragment used for stabilization.
The PDB metadata explicitly describes this as a nanobody.

key_findings: A high-resolution cryo-EM structure of the human M5 muscarinic acetylcholine receptor (M5 mAChR) in complex with mini-Gq, agonist acetylcholine, and positive allosteric modulator VU6007678 reveals an extrahelical allosteric binding site at the interface of transmembrane domains 3 and 4.

The discovered allosteric site for VU6007678 is distant from the orthosteric site but positioned near the highly conserved DRY activation motif, suggesting that PAM binding stabilizes the active state of the M5 mAChR.
This structure completes the active-state structural characterization for the M5 mAChR, the last remaining mAChR subtype without an active state structure.

evidence.quote_or_path: Human M5 muscarinic acetylcholine receptor complex with mini-Gq, agonist acetylcholine and positive allosteric modulator VU6007678 (title); VU6007678 demonstrated robust positive functional cooperativity with ACh signalling and exhibited significant allosteric agonism (Fig. 5b) in a Gq TruPath experiment.
evidence.reasoning: The paper explicitly identifies VU6007678 as a positive allosteric modulator and demonstrates allosteric agonism, corresponding to the 'Ago-PAM' role.

evidence.quote_or_path: Human M5 muscarinic acetylcholine receptor complex with mini-Gq, agonist acetylcholine and positive allosteric modulator VU6007678 (title); used the endogenous agonist ACh instead of iperoxo
evidence.reasoning: The paper explicitly identifies acetylcholine as an agonist.

g_protein.note: Mini-Gs alpha subunit with Gq specificity determinants at the receptor interface and Gai alpha N-terminus. Engineered chimeric G protein.

evidence.quote_or_path: Here, we present a 2.8 Å cryo-electron microscopy structure of the M5 mAChR complexed with heterotrimeric Gq protein and the agonist iperoxo, completing the active-state structural characterization of the mAChR family.; ACH-VU6007678-bound M5 mAChR sample... (1) complex formation was initiated through addition of scFv16 and Nb35, (2) ACh was included in all buffers... (3) VU6007678 was present throughout the purification... The high-quality cryo-EM density maps enabled precise place-ment of the receptor, mGaq, B1Y2, Nb35, and scFv16
evidence.reasoning: The presence of an agonist (acetylcholine) and a Gq protein complex unequivocally indicates an active functional state of the receptor.

structure_info.note: M5 mAChR with ICL3 residues 237-421 removed, N-terminal HA signal sequence and anti-Flag epitope tag added. Gq alpha subunit is a mini-Gs chimera with Gq residues at the receptor interface and Gai alpha N-terminus.
